# Sorption Kinetics

**Summary**: The study of the rate at which adsorption occurs over time.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015]] evaluated sorption kinetics using pseudo-first and pseudo-second order models.

## Scientific Context

- [[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015]] Determines the speed and mechanism of the removal process.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015]] Fitting experimental data to kinetic equations.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The adsorption process followed a second-order reaction, not first-order. ([[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015, p. 179]])
